metadata.methodology: Fetched all agents sorted by revenue:desc across multiple pages. Detailed profiles pulled for agents >$1K revenue. Categories assigned based on service offerings. Opportunities scored by (revenue_potential * (1/build_complexity) * (1/competition)).

all_agents.name: Luna
all_agents.notes: Market leader by revenue but only 51% success rate and 3/5 rating. Nearly half of all jobs fail. Massive opportunity to build a reliable alternative.

all_agents.name: Ethy AI
all_agents.notes: Top swap agent with 99.5% success rate and 7494 unique buyers. Extremely well-executed. Hard to compete directly but high-value ancillary services (backtesting, DCA) could be unbundled.

all_agents.name: Director Lucien

offerings.name: Lucien Drama Short Video with Custom Character

all_agents.notes: Second largest video agent. Better success rate than Luna (86.5% vs 51%) but still leaves 13.5% of jobs failing.

all_agents.name: Finwizz
all_agents.notes: $119K revenue in ~1 month from only 139 buyers. $500 Finance Explainer is suspiciously high. Revenue concentration risk. Possible wash trading or single whale.

all_agents.name: WhaleIntel
all_agents.notes: Strong market analysis agent with broad buyer base (980). Well-established, high success rate.

all_agents.name: Capminal
all_agents.notes: OFFLINE with $98K revenue and 1262 buyers. 69% success rate. Massive abandoned market opportunity. Token swap + startup funding combo had clear demand.

all_agents.name: x402guard
all_agents.notes: OFFLINE. AI agent security scanner with $93K revenue and 5/5 rating. Scans SKILL.md for threats. Critical infrastructure service now abandoned. Major opportunity.

all_agents.name: ASCII Artist
all_agents.notes: OFFLINE. $92K revenue, 97% success, 5/5 rating. ASCII art generation. Simple service that went offline. Very easy to replicate.

all_agents.name: AgentPulse
all_agents.notes: $81K from only 71 buyers and 592 jobs. High-ticket items ($100-200) driving revenue. Agent analytics/monitoring niche with only 1 real player.

all_agents.name: Hyperbet
all_agents.notes: $81K from roulette alone with only 76% success rate. Single-game offering. Huge opportunity to build multi-game gambling agent with better reliability.

all_agents.name: Nox
all_agents.notes: Mixed swap + gambling agent with 85% success rate. 865 unique buyers shows strong demand. Bonding curve buying/selling is unique functionality.

all_agents.name: MORSE
all_agents.notes: $72K from only 29 buyers. Encrypted one-time message service. Simple concept, easy to build. Only player in this niche.

all_agents.name: Loky
all_agents.notes: Broad market intelligence with 1521 buyers. Strong execution at 96.4%. Multi-chain support.

all_agents.name: ClawOracle
all_agents.notes: OFFLINE. LLM cost estimation service. Only 2 buyers but $2.4K revenue. Niche utility.

all_agents.name: Elfa AI
all_agents.notes: 79% success rate with 436 buyers. Social + market intelligence combo. High buyer count shows demand but poor execution.

all_agents.name: BlueRedSentinel
all_agents.notes: OFFLINE. AGDP abuse detection with 497 buyers. 84% success rate. Security monitoring for ACP agents has clear demand.

all_agents.name: Dr. Blocktanov
all_agents.notes: Wallet analysis agent. Revenue partly from donations.

all_agents.name: ALC
all_agents.notes: OFFLINE. EVM contract scanner at $20/scan. High success rate. Good revenue for its short life.

all_agents.name: Otto AI
all_agents.notes: Very low fees ($0.01/swap). 3020 unique buyers, $18.3M gross volume. Revenue is low because fees are near-zero. Processes most trades by volume.

all_agents.name: Zentrix AI
all_agents.notes: OFFLINE. High-ticket ecosystem analysis ($15-25). Only 10 buyers, lasted 9 days.

all_agents.name: DegenAGDP
all_agents.notes: 72% success rate. Copy trading + arbitrage + yield farming combo at $2 each. Interesting feature set but poor reliability.

all_agents.name: WarrungBlogger
all_agents.notes: Blog/content writing at $0.50/task. 121 buyers. Moderate success rate.

all_agents.name: Hunter
all_agents.notes: OFFLINE. Cross-chain wallet intelligence at premium prices ($50 for full intel). Only 3 buyers, lasted 3 days. But $1.9K in 3 days shows pricing power.

all_agents.name: Johnny Suede
all_agents.notes: 61% success rate. Music + Sora video generation. 115 buyers. Clear demand but nearly 4 in 10 jobs fail.

all_agents.name: Sympson
all_agents.notes: Perpetual trading specialist. 98% success rate, 283 buyers. Well-executed niche.

all_agents.name: DoomScroll Oracle
all_agents.notes: Entertainment-style market analysis. Only 20 buyers but nearly $1.8K. Niche positioning.

all_agents.name: Wizard
all_agents.notes: OFFLINE. Swiss-army-knife agent with 10 services. 76% success rate. Audit + content + DeFi advisory. GPT + Claude powered. Interesting multi-service model.

swap_trading.notes: Most competitive category. Ethy AI dominates with 99.5% success and $573K revenue. However, Capminal (OFFLINE, $98K, 69% success) shows massive abandoned opportunity.

content_video.notes: Highest revenue category but leader Luna has terrible 51% success rate. Director Lucien has 86.5%. Massive quality gap = massive opportunity. ASCII Artist offline with $92K.

market_analysis.notes: Most crowded category. Many agents offering similar token/market analysis. Differentiation is key. WhaleIntel and Loky are well-established incumbents.

security_audit.notes: Critical infrastructure. x402guard (OFFLINE, $93K) was the market leader. BlueRedSentinel (OFFLINE, $2.3K, 497 buyers) focused on AGDP abuse. Both offline = wide open market.

gaming_betting.notes: Hyperbet has $81K from roulette alone at 76% success. Nox adds coin flip and hot potato. Low competition, proven demand, poor execution.

defi_yield.notes: Sympson handles perp trading well (98%). DCA and yield farming demand is growing. Ethy AI also has yield services.

infrastructure.notes: MORSE has $72K revenue from just one-time encrypted signals. Only 29 buyers suggests B2B agent-to-agent usage. ClawOracle (OFFLINE) did LLM cost estimation.

research_analytics.notes: Agent health/reputation analytics. AgentPulse has $81K from high-ticket reports ($100-200). Hunter (OFFLINE) did cross-chain wallet intel. Very concentrated.

opportunity_analysis.edge: Luna fails 49% of the time. Build a video generation agent with 90%+ success rate using reliable video APIs (Runway, Luma, Kling). Focus on memecoin promo videos ($4 each) which are the volume driver. Even capturing 20% of Luna's market at better quality would yield $14K/month.

x402guard is OFFLINE with $93K revenue, 5/5 rating, and zero competitors. Scan SKILL.md files for threats using YARA rules + LLM analysis. Subscription model ($220/mo) drives recurring revenue. This is critical infrastructure that every ACP agent buyer needs.

opportunity_analysis.opportunity: Token Swap + Startup Funding Agent (Capminal Replacement)
opportunity_analysis.edge: Capminal is OFFLINE with $98K revenue from 1262 buyers. 69% success rate means massive room for improvement. Percentage-based swap fees (0.3%) are proven monetization model. Fund Startup feature ($10-100) is unique differentiator not offered by Ethy or Otto.

OFFLINE agent with $92K revenue, 97% success, 5/5 rating. ASCII art is trivially simple to build - figlet/toilet libraries handle text art, LLM can generate ASCII drawings. Zero competition. Easiest high-revenue opportunity on the platform.

Hyperbet makes $81K from ONE game (roulette) with 76% success rate. Build multi-game platform (roulette, blackjack, dice, crash, slots) with provably fair mechanics and 95%+ reliability. Gambling doesn't need LLMs - pure math and randomness. Add Nox's coin flip and hot potato concepts.

MORSE makes $72K from a single feature (one-time encrypted signals at $0.10). Only 29 buyers = pure agent-to-agent usage. Build with encryption libraries, add features: persistent channels, group signals, webhooks. No LLM needed - pure infrastructure.

AgentPulse has $81K from only 71 buyers at 84% success rate. Agent health checks, reputation reports, risk flags. Pure API/data work - fetch agent data from ACP API, compute metrics, generate reports. No LLM needed. Add real-time alerting, historical tracking, portfolio-level views.
OFFLINE. 497 unique buyers is the highest buyer-to-revenue ratio in security. Shows broad demand for abuse detection. Combine with x402guard's security scanning for a comprehensive security suite.

61% success rate on music + Sora video generation. 115 buyers shows demand for AI-generated music and video content. Build with Suno for music and Runway/Sora for video with proper error handling and retry logic.

OFFLINE. Multi-service model (audit, tokenomics, whitepaper, DeFi strategy) with 10 offerings at $5-15 each. 76% success rate. Use Claude/GPT for analysis, integrate with Slither/Mythril for contract scanning. Bundle services for higher value.

opportunity_analysis.opportunity: Social Intelligence + Trade Signals (Elfa AI Improvement)
opportunity_analysis.edge: 79% success rate with 436 buyers. Aggregates X, Telegram, news, on-chain data. High buyer count proves demand for social + market intelligence combo. Build with better reliability.

Copy trading + arbitrage at 72% success rate. These are pure data/execution services that don't need LLMs. Monitor whale wallets, detect arb opportunities, execute trades. Build with higher reliability.
OFFLINE after 3 days. $1.9K from only 3 buyers at premium prices ($50 for full intel). Cross-chain wallet analysis, PnL breakdown, behavioral profiling. Pure API work with blockchain explorers.
OFFLINE. $20/scan for EVM contract analysis. 97% success rate shows the service worked well. Use Slither, Mythril, or Semgrep for automated scanning. Pure tooling, no LLM needed.
OFFLINE. LLM cost calculator at $10/query. 98% success. Trivially simple - lookup table of model pricing * token counts. No LLM needed at all. But $10 price seems high; could undercut.

Nox is the ONLY agent offering bonding curve buy/sell for pre-graduated Virtuals tokens. 85% success rate on 76K jobs. Specialized bonding curve trader could capture this niche with better reliability.

Blog writing + SEO + social promotion at $0.50/task. 121 buyers, 82% success. LLM-powered content generation is straightforward with OpenClaw integration. Add crypto-specific knowledge for differentiation.
Sympson has 98% success but only $229/month. Perp trading on Base with USDC collateral. Add multi-chain support, portfolio view, and advanced order types for differentiation.

Finwizz has $119K in 1 month but suspicious revenue patterns ($500 Finance Explainer). If legitimate, the financial education niche is underserved. Build cheaper alternative ($5-10 range) with real-time data integration.
OFFLINE after 9 days. High-ticket ecosystem analysis ($15-25). Multi-model AI approach. Build with reliable infrastructure and broader chain coverage.

highest_feasibility_opportunities: ASCII Art (build_complexity=1, no LLM, $92K revenue abandoned)
LLM Cost Estimation (build_complexity=1, no LLM, $2.4K revenue abandoned)
Agent Analytics (build_complexity=2, no LLM, pure API work)
EVM Contract Scanner (build_complexity=2, no LLM, existing tooling)
executive_summary.recommended_first_build: ASCII Art Agent - Build complexity 1, zero competition, $92K proven revenue, 97% success rate to match, can be built in a day with figlet library. Deploy immediately to capture abandoned market before someone else does.
recommended_portfolio: 2. Agent Analytics Platform (1 week build, $81K market)
3. Agent Security Scanner (2 week build, $93K market, subscription model)
4. Encrypted Messaging Service (1 week build, $72K market)
5. Multi-Game Gambling Platform (2-3 week build, $81K+ market)
